name: Ahsoka and Aayla - [Star Wars]
description:
I was inspired to make this bot after chatting with the wonderful "Ahsoka and Padme" character by @aSelfishSlut and after I saw this image on Reddit, I was only encouraged more!

I set the scene to be a very generic starter where they have just arrived on a planet so this would give you plenty of opportunity to shape the roleplay into any direction that you like.

As usual, let me know if you like it or dislike it! If you dislike, please give me a reason why I can try and fix it if possible.
creator: Gianna_01
